task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened or read the baseline script and DSN specifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal commands (e.g., cat, less) or a text editor displaying the contents of ~/Documents/missions/gateway_nrho_baseline.script or ~/Desktop/dsn_specs.txt.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent configured the three required GroundStation objects with the correct parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI or text editor showing GroundStation objects named Goldstone, Madrid, and Canberra, with CentralBody set to Earth and MinimumElevationAngle set to 10.0.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent configured the ContactLocator with the correct target, observers, and occulting bodies.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI or text editor showing a ContactLocator object targeting the Gateway, with the three ground stations as Observers, and both Earth and Moon listed as OccultingBodies.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the modified script and generated the contact report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager, terminal (ls), or GMAT GUI showing the saved script at ~/Documents/missions/gateway_nrho_dsn.script and the generated report at /home/ga/GMAT_output/Gateway_DSN_Contacts.txt.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent recorded the maximum blackout period in the correct format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal output showing the file ~/GMAT_output/blackout_analysis.txt containing the exact format 'Max blackout: <value> minutes'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually ran the GMAT simulation to generate the contact report.
integrity.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI actively running the mission script, or a terminal showing the execution of the GMAT command-line tool.

integrity.description: Verify the agent performed a genuine calculation to find the maximum blackout period.
integrity.visual_evidence: A custom script (e.g., Python), a spreadsheet, or terminal commands used to parse Gateway_DSN_Contacts.txt and compute the maximum time gap between contacts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply guess or hardcode the blackout value.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final value written to blackout_analysis.txt should logically follow from the output of their calculation script or manual analysis steps shown in previous screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The baseline script is at /home/ga/Documents/missions/gateway_nrho_baseline.script. The modified script must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/missions/gateway_nrho_dsn.script. The contact report must be generated at /home/ga/GMAT_output/Gateway_DSN_Contacts.txt. The final analysis must be in /home/ga/GMAT_output/blackout_analysis.txt formatted exactly as 'Max blackout: <value> minutes'. The ground stations must be Goldstone, Madrid, and Canberra with a 10.0 degree minimum elevation. The ContactLocator must use Earth and Moon as OccultingBodies.
